title: sperihedium triste
intro: Spergillum triste, also known as Spergulum triste, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is a type of annual or biennial weed that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Spergillum triste can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are said to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing coughs, and promoting digestive regularity.
